extDescription.message: Control video playback speed on any site: presets, percentages, and smart live-stream sync.

noVideo.message: No video found on the page — open a video and refresh.

liveNote.message: 🔴 Live stream: manual speed isn't applied — the stream stays at 100% until it needs to catch up. Speed is managed by Live-sync.

syncSubtitle.message: Automatically catch up to the live broadcast

syncHint.message: If the stream falls behind by more than the value above, the speed rises smoothly (up to the max) and returns to 100% once caught up. The buffer is respected — it won't speed up when little is buffered ahead.
